perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a maroon spaghetti-strap top and denim mini skirt stands in a hallway in front of a teal cabin door labeled 6580. She waves and speaks enthusiastically. (2) She opens the door and walks into the cabin, revealing two twin beds with white linens and a large window. (3) She approaches the window to show the harbor view, then sits on one of the beds while gesturing to the room's interior. (4) She moves into a small, white-tiled bathroom, pointing out the toilet and then stepping into the shower stall while holding the shower head.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo pop music begins immediately. A high-pitched, excited female voice speaks in Mandarin. (2) Subtle ambient room noise and footsteps are audible as the speaker moves through the cabin. (3) A digital chime sound effect plays briefly during a scene transition. (4) A second female voice (off-screen) responds to the main speaker, and both are heard laughing together at the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook Text: '開箱郵輪房間🚢' (Unboxing cruise room) - Excited tone. (2) Functional Text: '現在在麗新郵輪上🛳️' (Now on Resorts World One) - Informational. (3) Effect Text: '(海景好美!!!)' (The sea view is so beautiful!!!) - Appreciative tone. (4) Functional Text: '房間很乾淨 而且很歐式耶' (The room is very clean and very European style) - Descriptive. (5) Functional Text: '重點是不會很小' (The point is it's not very small) - Comparative tone. (6) Functional Text: '來看一下廁所!' (Let's look at the toilet!) - Directive. (7) Functional Text: '但是它的淋浴間很大' (But its shower stall is huge) - Emphatic. (8) Decorative Text: '哈哈哈哈' (Hahaha) - Playful tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at door -> Exploring the bedroom area -> Showing the bathroom

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator visible; 1 female camerawoman heard but not seen.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a maroon crop top and a denim mini skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a cruise ship cabin including a teal hallway door, twin beds with white sheets, a desk, a harbor-view window, and a compact white bathroom.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural daylight from the window mixed with warm indoor cabin lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a travel vlog intended to showcase and review a cabin on a 'Resorts World One' cruise ship. By unboxing the room, the creator shares her excitement and provides a practical look at the accommodations for her audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct mention of the cruise line and a positive showcase of the room facilities.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy Mandarin narration, vertical 'unboxing' format, and playful interaction with an off-camera companion.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Typical lifestyle/travel influencer content targeting young adult travelers interested in cruise vacations.
